title: Charred Crisp Norwegian Ikura Skillet
description: A show-off Norwegian dish featuring ikura, with a charred and crispy exterior and a molten, earthy interior, suitable for a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the rapeseed oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the ikura and cook for 2 minutes on each side, until charred and crispy.
Remove the ikura from the wok and set aside.
In the same wok, add the sesame oil and sauté the fresh dill for 30 seconds.
Add the spherical agar agar mixture and cook for 2 minutes, until it starts to set.
Add the sour cream and lemon juice to the wok, and stir to combine.
Return the ikura to the wok and toss to coat with the sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the ikura to a serving plate and garnish with additional fresh dill if desired.
Drizzle the safflower oil over the top of the ikura and serve immediately.
